titleStmt.title: SII 9.565: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 565. (A.R. No. 195 of 1913.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO A WATER-CHANNEL NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT HAVINAHALU-VIRAPURA, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1455, Jaya, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1534 April 28, Tuesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records that the king erected the siṁhāsana of the god Bukkēśvara to the west of the temple of Virūpākshadēva and made a gift of the village Doṇḍavaṭi for the service of the god. The gift is stated to have been made for the merit of his grandfather Īśvara-Nāyaka and grandmother Bukkāji-amma and that a copper-plate charter was granted to that effect and liṅgamudre stones set up on the boundaries of the village. The village was given to Rāmachandra-Dīkshita for conducting the worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
naṁdi
kēśvara
namastuṁgasiracuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā
ravē . trayalōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ
bhavē (tu) . śvasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhana
śakhavaruśaṁgaḷ 1455 neya jayasaṁva
tsarada vayiśākha śu 15 lu śrīmanmahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa Acyutarāyamahā
rāyarū taṁma taṁde narasaṇanāyakara tāyi bukkāji
Aṁmanavarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu śrīvirūpākṣadēvara
guḍiya mēlugaḍeya paḍuvalu sōmaṇanāyakara gōpu
radoḷage śrībukkēśvaradēvara siṁvasanavanu pratiṣṭheyanu māḍisi
Ā bukkēśvaradēvarige kuṟugōḍa sīmeyoḷagaṇa doṁ
ḍavaṭiya grāmavanu Aṁgaraṁgavayibōga nayivēdya
Amrutapaḍige sarvamānya yēkabhōgavāgi catussī
mege liṁgamudreya kalanū naṁdiya kalanū hākisi taṁ
ma muttiya �yośvaranāyakaAyanavarigū bukājiA
manavarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu silāsāśanavanu hā
kisi koḍahēḷi rāmacaṁdradīkṣitaAyanavarige sama
rpisida Apaṇeya nirupavanu cittaisi tāṁbrasaśanavanū ko
ṭṭu Ā doṁḍavaṭiya grāmavanu sarvamānyevāgi
samarpisi biṭṭa doṁḍavaṭiya grāma �yo grāmake
Āvanānobanu Upahatiya māḍi tapidare mātrugamana
māḍida dōśakke kōharū . vāgdattaṁ (.) manōdattaṁ (.) dhā
rādattaṁ (.) na dīyatē . ṣeṣṭirverśasahasrāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi ḥ . Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēsāṁmōva bhū
bhujāṁ . na bhōjyāna karagrā(ṁ)hyā vipradattāvasuṁdharā . nūnā
dhikākṣara likhitaṁ pramāṇamiti .
Digital edition of SII 9.565 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
